title: grok-visuals.yaml
description: Official JSON Schema for the v2.14 grok-visuals block. Declarative install-card media with first-class accessibility. Additive over v2.13 — validators ignore the block for v2.13-only repos.

version.description: Semantic version of this visuals configuration file.

author.description: X handle of the visuals config owner, prefixed with '@'.

compatibility.description: Platform specs this file is tested and compatible with. Must include grok-install.yaml@2.14+ or later.

visuals.description: The visuals block. Powers the install-card preview shown in galleries, docs, and the playground.

type.description: Media type rendered by the preview card.

src.description: Absolute or repo-relative URL to the primary media asset.

srcset.description: Optional responsive sources (DPI or width variants) that the renderer may pick from.

width.description: Intrinsic width of this variant in CSS pixels.

density.description: Device-pixel-ratio this variant is optimized for (e.g. 1, 2, 3).

poster.description: Poster frame URL shown before video playback. Ignored when type is not 'video'.

alt.description: Required text alternative describing the media content. Must be non-empty for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance.

title.description: Short headline rendered above the media in the preview card.

caption.description: Optional one-line caption rendered below the media.

description.description: Longer paragraph used for hover tooltips and search indexing.

theme.description: Card colour treatment. 'auto' follows the viewer's prefers-color-scheme.

layout.description: Card layout variant rendered by the playground and galleries.

accessibility.description: Declarations used by the preview renderer to honour WCAG 2.2 AA.

reduced_motion.description: When true, the renderer swaps animated media for the poster frame if the viewer prefers reduced motion.

contrast_ratio.description: Declared minimum contrast ratio of overlaid text on the media. Must be at least 4.5 for WCAG 2.2 AA body text.

captions.description: True if closed captions are embedded or sidecar.

transcript.description: URL to a full text transcript of the media.

cta.description: Optional call-to-action button rendered below the caption.

url.description: Target URL. Use https for external destinations.
